name: Contribution Graph

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/compare/0.9.0...0.10.0

- optimize: use luxon to calculate date
- feature: support hover link to show page preview
- fix tooltip may not be displayed
- ui: remove container margin and add padding
- ui: update shadow style in dark mode

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: support reset background color to default & set brightness to max default by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/61
* fix: week indicator not aligned if increased height of cell by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/64
* feat: support status in filter method for task by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/66
* feat: set brightness to max in color picker
* feat: update date input placeholder


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/compare/0.8.0...0.9.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* fix: task initialization state is incorrect when add filter first by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/52
* feat: add about tab in setting panel by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/54
* feat: support resize cell height and width by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/55
* fix: FILE_NAME  date field not work by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/56
* feat: unregister renderContributionGraph function when unload plugin by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/57
* feat: hide activity list container if no items by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/58
* feat: update default cell rules by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/59
* feat: set default background color to background-primary-alt by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/60


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/compare/0.7.0...0.8.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* support query task data to generate heatmap graph by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/30
* feat: use tab component to optimize form pages by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/31
* feat: auto generate date range by provided data in render api by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/32
* feat: justify edit-button top property to theme by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/34
* feat: redesign task query and filter logic by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/35
* feat: add fit screen setting by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/36
* feat: optimize calendar & git style graph style by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/37
* fix: git style graph render incorrectly if startOfWeek is not specifi… by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/38
* feat: click cell  to show related data item by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/39
* optimize: refactor i18n implementation by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/40
* feat: add latest month and years date range options by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/42


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/compare/0.5.0...0.6.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* feat: support customize global cell style by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/20
* feat: add create contribution graph context menu by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/21
* feat: add i18n to charts by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/22
* feat: supports specifying the format of dateField by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/24
* fix: tooltip may not hidden when graph re-rendered by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/11
* feat: support file.ctime and mtime as datefield by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/28
* feat: add datefield suggest by @vran-dev in https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/pull/29


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph/compare/0.4.0...0.5.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- add the `create contribution graph` command
- support `contributionGraph` codeblock covert to graph automatically
- support set title style
- support modify graph without writing code
- add react
- add new ci
- refactor render code

releases.author: vran-dev
releases.description:
- Render fixed date range chart
- Render recent date range chart
- Customize start of weekday
- Customize cell style
- Interactive charts, you can customize cell click event, hover to show statistic data
- Integrate with DataviewJS
